posts.title: Measuring AI in My LinkedIn Feed with Python
posts.excerpt: I built a Python utility that logs into LinkedIn, samples my feed, scores likely AI-assisted writing patterns, and turns the results into shareable charts.

posts.title: Building BestChessMove: Django, Hosting Friction, and a Practical Pivot
posts.excerpt: How I approached a chess project I cared about, why the original Django deployment failed on shared hosting, and how I adapted the implementation to ship anyway.
